wiki.summary: “Gnarly“ is a song by the global girl group KATSEYE. It was released on April 30, 2025, through HYBE and Geffen Records, as the lead single for their EP, "BEAUTIFUL CHAOS". Described as a hyperpop song, “Gnarly“ was written by Alice Longyu Gao, Tim Randolph, Kyle Buckley, Jacob Kasher Hindlin and Madison Love, with production by Buckley, "Hitman" Bang and Slow Rabbit. Despite initially receiving a polarizing response from fans, the song became a success Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: “Gnarly“ is a song by the global girl group KATSEYE. It was released on April 30, 2025, through HYBE and Geffen Records, as the lead single for their EP, "BEAUTIFUL CHAOS". Described as a hyperpop song, “Gnarly“ was written by Alice Longyu Gao, Tim Randolph, Kyle Buckley, Jacob Kasher Hindlin and Madison Love, with production by Buckley, "Hitman" Bang and Slow Rabbit. Despite initially receiving a polarizing response from fans, the song became a success, earning the group their first entries on the Billboard Hot 100 and the UK singles chart. Read more on Last.fm.
